name: Vampire Astro - HC
description:
"keep the window open, okay?"

[SFW INTRO]

ICHOR DOCTOR POV

"You work as a ichor doctor in a small village, after losing another patient, you felt bad and ran home, and you barely noticed that a being could be watching you from afar...arriving home, you take off your uniform and go straight to bed so you can go to sleep, However, when you were going to close the curtains... a nocturnal being appears right in front of you."

yes, I made one of Astro because let's say he's the hottest one in the fanfic... so here it is!

once again, the HC is not mine! both the image and the fanfic are from meandering moon on twitter/x!
